strategy.name: DualMA_Trend_15m_Indices
strategy.rationale: 15m dual SMA cross with RSI trend confirmation. Faster timeframe gives more trades with defined momentum; stops sized to 15m ATR range; cheapest spreads dominate allocation.

history.analysis: 7/7 stops hit, 0 winners. Stop 0.4% too tight for 1h volatility; trailing stop 0.25% prematurely exits; RSI pullback entries catch falling knives; BTC overtraded (3 losses); AUDJPY spread erodes edge.
mistakes: Stop 0.4% far too tight for 1h candles on BTC/XAU/USTEC - normal noise exceeds it, causing immediate stop-outs
Trailing stop 0.25% triggers before any meaningful move develops, locking in losses on winners
RSI<45 pullback in uptrend often means trend is actually reversing, not a healthy dip
BTC traded 3 times with expensive 0.02% spread and wide ATR - cost/volatility ratio unfavorable at 1h
changes: Widen stop to match instrument ATR; target 2R minimum so spread cost is <10% of risk
Remove trailing stop or widen significantly to let trades breathe
Replace RSI pullback with breakout/momentum confirmation to avoid catching knives
Drop BTC; focus on USTEC and XAU (cheapest spreads) plus low-spread FX
Add session filter to trade only high-liquidity hours

strategy.name: DualMA_Trend_15m_Indices
strategy.rationale: 15m dual SMA cross with RSI trend confirmation. Faster timeframe gives more trades with defined momentum; stops sized to 15m ATR range; cheapest spreads dominate allocation.

history.analysis: Enter pullbacks within established hourly trends using price-vs-SMA trend filter and RSI dip. Cheap spreads on USTEC and XAU; only trade with trend to cut false signals.
changes: Tournament of 3: MeanReversion_OversoldFX (1h) net $-26.54 in 9 trades | Momentum_Breakout_CheapMarkets (15m) net $-85.79 in 11 trades | TrendFilter_PullbackEntry (1h) net $54.38 in 25 trades <- DEPLOYED

strategy.name: TrendFilter_PullbackEntry
strategy.rationale: Enter pullbacks within established hourly trends using price-vs-SMA trend filter and RSI dip. Cheap spreads on USTEC and XAU; only trade with trend to cut false signals.
